title: VXG Power Flatness — NPI Test Bench

panels.title: Per-Unit Sweep — Output Power vs Frequency (every unit, full curve)
panels.description: Each colored line = ONE unit's full frequency sweep. PASS = curve stays inside the solid red NPI limits (nominal ± tolerance, dBm). FAIL = curve crosses outside. Dashed orange = M9484C warranted (datasheet: ALC on, CW, +22-28 °C, +15 dBm to -60 dBm column). Dotted green = M9484C typical. Bands are absolute dBm centered on the configured nominal.

targets.query:
nominal = float(v: ${nominal_dbm})
tol = float(v: ${tolerance_db})

from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and (r._field == "power_dbm" or r._field == "frequency_hz"))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "unit_id", "run_id"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "unit_id", "frequency_hz", "power_dbm"])
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id", "frequency_hz"])
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["unit_id", "frequency_hz", "power_dbm"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["frequency_hz"], columnKey: ["unit_id"], valueColumn: "power_dbm")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      npi_upper: nominal + tol,
      npi_lower: nominal - tol,
      spec_upper:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 6000000000.0 then nominal + 1.6
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 8500000000.0 then nominal + 1.1
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal + 1.2
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal + 1.7
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal + 1.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 50000000000.0 then nominal + 2.1
        else nominal + 2.2,
      spec_lower:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 6000000000.0 then nominal - 1.6
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 8500000000.0 then nominal - 1.1
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal - 1.2
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal - 1.7
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal - 1.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 50000000000.0 then nominal - 2.1
        else nominal - 2.2,
      typ_upper:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal + 0.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal + 0.5
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal + 0.3
        else nominal + 0.7,
      typ_lower:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal - 0.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal - 0.5
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal - 0.3
        else nominal - 0.7
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["frequency_hz"])

panels.title: Latest-Run Outcome per Unit
panels.description: Latest run per unit. Row is red if at least one frequency point fell outside the NPI tolerance band.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatnessRun" and (r._field == "verdict" or r._field == "failed_point_count" or r._field == "point_count"))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "unit_id", "run_id"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id"])
  |> last(column: "_time")
  |> keep(columns: ["unit_id", "run_id", "verdict", "failed_point_count", "point_count"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["failed_point_count"], desc: true)

panels.title: Production Yield
panels.description: % of units whose latest run was PASS (verdict=true, zero out-of-spec points).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatnessRun" and r._field == "verdict")
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id"])
  |> last(column: "_time")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: if r._value then 1.0 else 0.0, _time: now()}))
  |> mean()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value * 100.0, _field: "yield_pct", _time: now()}))

panels.title: Failing Units
panels.description: Number of units whose latest run was FAIL.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatnessRun" and r._field == "verdict")
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id"])
  |> last(column: "_time")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: if r._value then 0 else 1, _time: now()}))
  |> sum(column: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, _field: "failing_units", _time: now()}))

panels.title: Worst-Case Deviation
panels.description: Largest |measured - nominal| observed across all units and frequencies in the window. > tolerance ⇒ at least one unit failed NPI; > 1.7 dB ⇒ outside the worst M9484C warranted band (17-20 GHz).

targets.query:
import "math"
nominal = float(v: ${nominal_dbm})

from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and r._field == "power_dbm")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: math.abs(x: r._value - nominal)}))
  |> group()
  |> max()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: r._value, _field: "worst_dev_db", _time: now()}))

panels.title: Anomaly Detection — Latest Run
panels.description: IsolationForest on unit power curves. Negative score = more anomalous. is_anomaly=true flags units whose full frequency response deviates from the fleet.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerAnomalies")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "unit_id"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "unit_id", "anomaly_score", "is_anomaly"])
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id"])
  |> last(column: "anomaly_score")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["anomaly_score"], desc: false)

panels.title: Fleet Statistics — min / mean / max ACROSS units, per frequency (latest run per unit)
panels.description: Envelope across the latest run per unit. At each frequency: min = worst unit, max = best unit, mean = fleet average. Bands as in Panel 1 (M9484C warranted/typical, datasheet ALC-on CW). Compare to the per-unit view above to find offending units.

targets.query:
nominal = float(v: ${nominal_dbm})
tol = float(v: ${tolerance_db})

from(bucket: "vxg_tests")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "PowerFlatness" and (r._field == "power_dbm" or r._field == "frequency_hz"))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "unit_id", "run_id"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "unit_id", "frequency_hz", "power_dbm"])
  |> group(columns: ["unit_id", "frequency_hz"])
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_time"])
  |> keep(columns: ["frequency_hz", "power_dbm"])
  |> group(columns: ["frequency_hz"])
  |> reduce(
      fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
        mn:  if r.power_dbm < accumulator.mn then r.power_dbm else accumulator.mn,
        mx:  if r.power_dbm > accumulator.mx then r.power_dbm else accumulator.mx,
        sum: accumulator.sum + r.power_dbm,
        n:   accumulator.n + 1.0
      }),
      identity: {mn: 1000.0, mx: -1000.0, sum: 0.0, n: 0.0}
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      frequency_hz: r.frequency_hz,
      min_dbm:  r.mn,
      max_dbm:  r.mx,
      mean_dbm: r.sum / r.n,
      npi_upper: nominal + tol,
      npi_lower: nominal - tol,
      spec_upper:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 6000000000.0 then nominal + 1.6
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 8500000000.0 then nominal + 1.1
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal + 1.2
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal + 1.7
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal + 1.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 50000000000.0 then nominal + 2.1
        else nominal + 2.2,
      spec_lower:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 6000000000.0 then nominal - 1.6
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 8500000000.0 then nominal - 1.1
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal - 1.2
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal - 1.7
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal - 1.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 50000000000.0 then nominal - 2.1
        else nominal - 2.2,
      typ_upper:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal + 0.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal + 0.5
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal + 0.3
        else nominal + 0.7,
      typ_lower:
        if r.frequency_hz <= 17000000000.0 then nominal - 0.3
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 20000000000.0 then nominal - 0.5
        else if r.frequency_hz <= 44000000000.0 then nominal - 0.3
        else nominal - 0.7
    }))
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["frequency_hz"])
